acceptance.assertion: Blanket language that categorically forbids automatic merge/deploy/durable autonomy is replaced or qualified.
Bureau, Cabinet, Chronik, Plexer, Lenskit, and Vibe-Lab are documented as helpers rather than universal gates.
High-impact actions are marked and receipt-bound, not categorically forbidden.

goal: Replace restrictive autonomy wording with grip-oriented doctrine: Grabowski may act when target, scope, risk, and receipt are clear.

metadata.claim_mode_note: Task claim mode describes implementation repository access; resulting grip effects are documented separately.
metadata.status_note: Implementation PR is open; keep task planned until PR review and merge evidence are present.

validated_acceptance.docs-updated: PR #98 updated autonomy doctrine language rather than leaving blanket prohibitions unqualified.
validated_acceptance.high-impact-language: PR #98 clarifies high-impact actions as marked and receipt-bound.
validated_acceptance.organs-positioned: PR #98 documents organs as helpers instead of universal gates.

metadata.verification_note: Live GitHub check shows Grabowski PR #98 merged on 2026-07-08 and closed the autonomy doctrine documentation slice.

title: Update autonomy doctrine docs
